text: You will have bad times, but they will always wake you up to the stuff you weren’t paying attention to.
author: Robin Williams

text: Don't be afraid of failure. This is the way to succeed.
author: LeBron James

text: The only failure is not to try.
author: Virgil Abloh

text: Being unbothered when people attempt to trigger you is a superpower.
If you can't stop thinking about it, don't stop working for it.
Don't be afraid to try again.
Act like the person you want to become.
Risk is always better than regret.
One machine can do the work of fifty ordinary men. No machine can do the work of one extraordinary man.
author: Elbert Hubbard

text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
author: Sydney Harris

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Impossible is just a big word thrown around by small men.
author: Muhammad Ali

text: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
author: Marie Curie

text: You must never be fearful about what you are doing when it is right.
author: Rosa Parks

text: The most difficult thing is the decision to act.
author: Amelia Earhart

text: Better an oops, than a what if.
The fears we don't face become our limits.
To exist is not enough, one must live.
A big part of who i am is who im not.
